sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 11.14 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.11)

statement.latex: Is every finite simple group characterized by its Cartan matrix over an algebraically closed field of characteristic 2? In (R.\,Brandl, Arch. Math., 38 (1982), 322--323) it is shown that for any given finite group there exist only finitely many finite groups with the same Cartan matrix.

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
